arts.ttl: Hull City man on Ruben Selles, the Championship relegation fight and Blackburn Rovers
arts.sum: Sean McLoughlin says it's crucial that Hull City bounce back after the disappointment of their 1-0 Boxing Day defeat at Preston North End when they face Blackburn Rovers on Sunday afternoon. We need to bounce back from it," the Irishman told Hull Live as he looked back on the Deepdale disappointment and 2024 as a whole.

arts.ttl: Predicted Hull City XI to face Blackburn Rovers with key change on the cards
arts.sum: Bringing in Jacob on the left would allow Giles to push further forward down the left, while Drameh could operate ahead of Lewie Coyle, and provide much-needed cover to the Tigers skipper, who has been going through a difficult spell in recent weeks. City's predicted starting XI: Pandur, Jacob, McLoughlin, Jones, Coyle, Giles, Alzate, Slater, Drameh, Puerta, Burstow.

arts.ttl: Hull City injury problems laid bare ahead of testing Blackburn Rovers trip
arts.sum: City have been hit by a flurry of major injuries in recent weeks with the likes of key summer signings Liam Millar and Mohamed Belloumi out for the season. Expected return date: Millar is out for the season

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers chief John Eustace assesses 'exciting' Hull City challenge
arts.sum: Three weeks on from that reverse in East Yorkshire, City will be looking to get back to winning ways after losing 1-0 at Preston North End on Boxing Day. Rovers, meanwhile, continued their fine campaign so far with a gritty 2-2 draw against Sunderland at Ewood Park, snatching a 90th-minute leveller to keep them firmly in the play-off pack. We are looking forward to each challenge," Eustace said of the busy festive period before going on to reflect on City.

arts.sum: It was a familiar story for Hull City on Thursday as they lost for the seventh time away from home, going down to a 1-0 loss at Preston North End. There has been a huge lack of cohesion and chemistry throughout the season, so creating that will be one of the key jobs for Selles moving forward.
